summary: Base W9 — first post-deload step-up week, greenlit by Sun 6/14 both-clean AM (Adj #89). Hill-stride DEBUT landed clean W9 Mon (Adj #44 satisfied) — first concentric calf/Achilles dose on the reactive tendon, no Achilles or knee signal. §4.C: 4×8 min @ T Tue / Hyp A Wed / 30 min Thu / 40 min + 6 strides Fri / 60 min long Sat + Hyp B PM; v4.3 cap ~20 mpw. T target nudged to ~7:50–7:55/mi (Adj #77) for Tue's 4×8. Calf 335 bump released for Sat (Adj #40/#89). Bumps queued: preacher 65 Wed (Adj #83); holds-until-clean: lat 155 (Adj #80), pushdown 22.5/arm pain-gated (Adj #84); chest-supp row reverted to 85 (Adj #81). Knee watch continues (bilateral during-run Sat 6/13) but clean on Mon's hill strides; §11.D bar holds Phase C opt-ins parked. Lift schedule unchanged. Tennis elbow clock reset W8 Tue (Adj #75) — keep §10.A dailies.
